headline: Cummins (NYSE:CMI): A Quality Stock Built for Long-Term Compounding
summary: Quality investing focuses on companies with durable advantages, strong profitability, and financial discipline. Cummins (CMI) meets key criteria with a 17.35% ROIC, 116.6% profit quality, and manageable debt, making it a prime long-term holding.
